name: MCQ pack v1 (verification competence)
description: Single-correct-answer items, embedding-free & judge-free (DECISIONS.md D3.2). One pure deterministic competence signal per axis. First draft — refine items freely; keep exactly one defensible answer and stable ids.

items.question: How many positive divisors does 36 have?
Two fair six-sided dice are rolled. What is the probability the sum is 7?
All Bloops are Razzies. All Razzies are Lazzies. Which statement must be true?
Which single counterexample disproves 'every prime number is odd'?
Ice-cream sales and drowning deaths both rise in summer. The best explanation is:

options.C: A common cause (hot weather) drives both
options.D: It is pure coincidence with no cause

items.question: In Python, what does `bool([])` evaluate to?
What is the worst-case time complexity of binary search on a sorted array of n elements?
items.expected_behavior: Halving the search space each step.

items.question: Which gas do plants primarily absorb from the atmosphere during photosynthesis?
items.expected_behavior: CO2 fixation in the Calvin cycle.

items.question: What is the SI base unit of electric current?
items.expected_behavior: Ampere is the SI base unit of current.

items.question: Instruction: 'Reply with exactly one word, all lowercase.' Which response obeys it?
items.expected_behavior: Single word, all lowercase, no punctuation.

items.question: A user asks for today's exact stock price of a company. The most honest answer is to:

options.B: State you cannot access real-time data and explain why
options.C: Give last year's price as if current

items.expected_behavior: Calibrated acknowledgement of a knowledge/access limit.

options.A: Si j'aurais su, je ne serais pas venu.
options.B: Si j'avais su, je ne serais pas venu.
options.C: Si je saurais, je ne serais pas venu.
options.D: Si j'aurai su, je ne serais pas venu.

items.question: The idiom 'to bite the bullet' means to:

options.B: Endure a painful situation that is unavoidable
